resume-builder.whatItIs: The Resume Builder creates professional resumes and CVs with customizable templates, formatting, and content suggestions. Build ATS-friendly resumes that stand out to recruiters and pass applicant tracking systems.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Resume Builder

steps.name: Choose a template
steps.text: Browse resume templates by industry and style. Select a clean, professional template optimized for ATS systems.

steps.name: Enter your information
steps.text: Fill in your contact details, work experience, education, skills, and achievements. Use the content suggestions for effective bullet points.

steps.name: Customize the design
steps.text: Adjust fonts, colors, section order, and spacing. Preview how your resume looks to recruiters and ATS systems.

steps.name: Download your resume
steps.text: Download your resume as a PDF or DOCX file. Share it with employers or upload to job portals.

faqs.question: What makes a resume ATS-friendly?
faqs.answer: ATS-friendly resumes use standard section headings, simple formatting without tables or graphics, standard fonts, and keywords from the job description. Avoid columns, text boxes, and unusual formatting.

faqs.question: Can I create a CV instead of a resume?
faqs.answer: Yes, the tool supports both resumes (1-2 pages, focused) and CVs (detailed, academic or research-focused). Choose the format appropriate for your industry and region.

faqs.question: Does it check for ATS compatibility?
faqs.answer: Premium plans include ATS scoring that analyzes your resume against job descriptions and suggests improvements for better compatibility.

faqs.question: Is the Resume Builder free?
faqs.answer: Basic resume creation is free. Premium plans offer advanced templates, ATS scoring, cover letters, and multiple export formats.

resume-builder.seoDescription: Build professional resumes online for free. Create ATS-friendly CVs with customizable templates. Download as PDF or DOCX for job applications.

cover-letter-generator.whatItIs: The Cover Letter Generator creates professional cover letters tailored to specific job applications. Generate compelling cover letters that highlight your qualifications and match job requirements.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Cover Letter Generator

steps.name: Enter job details
steps.text: Paste the job description and enter the company name, position title, and hiring manager name if known.

steps.name: Enter your background
steps.text: List your relevant experience, skills, and achievements. The tool uses this to personalize the cover letter.

steps.name: Generate cover letter
steps.text: Click generate to create a tailored cover letter. The tool matches your qualifications with job requirements.

steps.name: Edit and download
steps.text: Review the generated letter, make personal edits, and download as PDF or DOCX for submission.

faqs.question: How long should a cover letter be?
faqs.answer: A cover letter should be 3-4 paragraphs and fit on one page. Keep it concise while highlighting your most relevant qualifications for the position.

faqs.question: Should I customize for each job?
faqs.answer: Yes, customize your cover letter for each application. Mention the company name, specific job requirements, and how your skills match their needs.

faqs.question: Can I use AI-generated cover letters?
faqs.answer: AI-generated cover letters provide a good starting point, but always review and personalize them. Add specific examples and your genuine voice to make it authentic.

faqs.question: Is the Cover Letter Generator free?
faqs.answer: Basic cover letter generation is free. Premium plans offer multiple versions, A/B testing, and advanced personalization.

cover-letter-generator.seoDescription: Generate cover letters online for free. Create professional job application cover letters tailored to specific positions. Download as PDF or DOCX.

portfolio-generator.whatItIs: The Portfolio Generator creates professional portfolio websites for showcasing your work, projects, and skills. Build a personal portfolio with customizable templates, project galleries, and contact forms.

howToUse.name: How to Use the Portfolio Generator

steps.name: Choose a template
steps.text: Select a portfolio template matching your profession: designer, developer, writer, photographer, or general professional.

steps.name: Add your content
steps.text: Upload project images, write project descriptions, add your bio, resume, and contact information. Organize projects by category.

steps.name: Customize design
steps.text: Change colors, fonts, and layout to match your personal brand. Set up a custom domain if desired.

steps.name: Publish your portfolio
steps.text: Preview your portfolio and publish it online. Share the link with employers, clients, and on social media.

faqs.question: What should I include in my portfolio?
faqs.answer: Include your best 4-8 projects with descriptions, your skills, about me section, resume, and contact information. Quality matters more than quantity.

faqs.question: Can I use my own domain?
faqs.answer: Yes, premium plans support custom domains. Connect your portfolio to example.com or any domain you own.

faqs.question: Is the portfolio mobile-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, all templates are fully responsive and look great on mobile devices, tablets, and desktops.

faqs.question: Is the Portfolio Generator free?
faqs.answer: Basic portfolio creation is free. Premium plans offer custom domains, advanced features, and removal of branding.

portfolio-generator.seoDescription: Create portfolio websites online for free. Build professional portfolios with project galleries and custom branding. Showcase your work to employers and clients.
